phonetic: piﾋ斥埈ﾉ値ﾉ囘ﾊ段; pﾉｪﾋ埈ﾉ値ﾉ囘ﾊ段
phoneticUs: piﾋ斥埈ﾉ騨人ﾉ囘ﾊ段ﾋ継ﾉｪﾋ埈ﾉ騨人ﾉ囘ﾊ段
examples: In a wide sense of the word, criminology includes penology.
Death penalty reprieve, in the sense of penology cannot be deemed a sort of alternative.
Attempt of crime is a point of importance to research for the penology circle and there exist many different viewpoints at home and abroad.
